name: The White House
subject: Medal of Honor Presentation
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf0ca3cad7d6b89577e03a0378d46edcc1e29833d520863e681d8af46eea1e802ea4e6c450212e5f28469bbbcbfae509b4e626660aed7a0

Today at the White House, President Donald J. Trump will award the Medal of Honor to former Specialist Five James C. McCloughan, U.S. Army. McCloughan will receive the Medal of Honor for distinguished actions during 48 hours of close-combat fighting against enemy forces near Don Que, Vietnam, from May 13 to 15, 1969. McCloughan, then 23 years old, voluntarily risked his life on nine separate occasions to rescue wounded and disoriented comrades. He suffered wounds from shrapnel and small arms fire on three separate occasions, but refused medical evacuation to stay with his unit, and continued to brave enemy fire to rescue, treat, and defend wounded Americans.

-------------

President Trump Speaks to Law Enforcement Officials on MS-13

President Trump spoke to Federal, State, and local Law Enforcement Officials on Friday and addressed the work being done to eradicate illegal immigration and rid the country of violent gangs such as MS-13. The President thanked the officers for their sacrifice saying, "You are really special, special Americans. And thank you in particular to the great police, sheriffs, and ICE officers. You do a spectacular job. The country loves you."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf0ca3cad7d6b897c3795daeb612e601d99f03643373077d12aa856a5511d5c9a7055d266b1892e24049a836fa70f73ce6efd1ecbd2bf5c
Watch the video

Vice President Pence Travels to Eastern Europe

On Saturday, Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence left Washington, D.C. en route to Eastern Europe, where they will be making stops in Estonia, Georgia, and Montenegro. The Vice President will be working to advance President Trump's America First agenda and strengthen our partnerships in the region.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf0ca3cad7d6b891808d2d79a4e405ffceb77f814033707678f7f67ebe08e665d13ac4280b91f02d415c31934745fddbba2729bbd090571
Watch the day 1 video

Celebrating and Honoring American Heroes

Last week was American Heroes Week at the White House, where President Trump was proud to celebrate and honor those who put their own lives on the line every day to protect American lives.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf0ca3cad7d6b89ad516b70a1845fc63a487452e36a248a7bfaf9b8be5e2572d102f706107ba50bca8e2cb33a53253a49bbee8b57d62b1c
Watch the week in review video

Photo of the Day

Vice President Mike Pence and Estonian President Kersti Kaljulaid | Monday, July 31, 2017 (Official White House photo by Myles D. Cullen)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will present the Medal of Honor to former Specialist Five James C. McCloughan, U.S. Army, for conspicuous gallantry during the Vietnam War.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf0ca3cad7d6b896c02103d3867dafb19386ba55ff28b5c108e89b92ca6faab8b142647e3889b615a72a26ce596f046e8ea558d87e09348
Watch live at 3pm EST. Vice President Pence began his day with meetings in Estonia, and will travel to Georgia this morning.

Coming Up This Week

Tomorrow, the President will participate in an American small business event, The Engine of the American Dream. The Vice President will continue traveling across Eastern Europe to strengthen America's partnerships.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf0ca3cad7d6b89ca18c2c9cec6607ea991f79d6c97a6a2bef031d49aaacdb94479448271d307980a34698aad9af457b9c5b15382cd9beb
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf0ca3cad7d6b89a3a43ded0764df4a97de644af0bb06b3321614e808e7c163d08b7fc27cf728fe09075c709ce151c885554ef4291c51d9
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d400331a5b07588e083d4a13be0b3fc7d5e1c0f1625d2b7a915bf800ade391ffdaed52c4e701d01b6bd9423da4acc85b82
Unsubscribe

# Join Us in Person or Online August 16
---
# CREATING THE DECLARATION OF INDEPENDENCE
# At
# HEARTLAND INSTITUTE, AUGUST 16, 2017
Hope you can join me at the [Heartland Institute](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/3/3awT2GY__ZMCH9kEDFpTAw/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhcnRsYW5kLm9yZy9hYm91dC11cy9pbmRleC5odG1s) on August 16 when I will be discussing my new book, _**[Creating the Declaration of Independence](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/4/NMaZq_0NJMAc7EberQw-Xw/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMnYxV2F5Ng)**_ , which takes you to the weeks before July 4, 1776, and into the minds of Richard Henry Lee, John Adams, and Thomas Jefferson. You can [register for the event](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/5/N6ZhZzReCif3XuAGUDR5QQ/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhcnRsYW5kLm9yZy9ldmVudHMvZXZlbnRzL2NyZWF0aW5nLXRoZS1kZWNsYXJhdGlvbi1vZi1pbmRlcGVuZGVuY2U), which begins at 5:30 PM CDT [here](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/6/UHwwxGi7v4i9N3piwE3uFw/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhcnRsYW5kLm9yZy9ldmVudHMvZXZlbnRzL2NyZWF0aW5nLXRoZS1kZWNsYXJhdGlvbi1vZi1pbmRlcGVuZGVuY2U). If you are unable to join us in person, [watch the webcast at this link](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/7/JbrDmJEYyvw0ivcU_39R8Q/aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9kb3VjbHlOVExvaw) beginning at 6 PM.We recently celebrated the 241st anniversary of our nation's birth. The celebrations were marked with parades, barbecues and fireworks with little reflection upon the dramas preceding July 4, 1776. Scant thought is given to the reason for the parties: the birth of our nation and announcement of its core principles in the Declaration of Independence. _**[Creating the Declaration of Independence](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/8/IUECvy3fqQOio1BbmKbLIw/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMnYxV2F5Ng) **_sheds light on WHY there's a celebration.On August 16th at Heartland, I'll be talking about Richard Henry Lee's trepidation as he knows when he proposes American Independence to the Second Continental Congress that he is literally risking beheading. There's also the back stories of Adams and Jefferson at City Tavern as over a beer they begin crafting the Declaration of Independence and how Jefferson came to reluctantly draft the Declaration when few others, including Adams, thought that Jefferson's assignment was important. I'll provide a lawerly insight into a shortcut Jefferson used to craft a document of such immortality on such short notice.The special skills of Jefferson will be on display as we talk about how he set forth in 55 words the American Creed, beginning with "We hold these truths to be self-evident..." While I hope you'll [join us at Heartland](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/9/ZHYD7_9TwOPmOZSxJRs4yg/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhcnRsYW5kLm9yZy9ldmVudHMvZXZlbnRzL2NyZWF0aW5nLXRoZS1kZWNsYXJhdGlvbi1vZi1pbmRlcGVuZGVuY2U), but if you're unable, tune into the [webcast which will allow you to send questions](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/10/6aGeVYQc87k-UuutNimqHg/aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9kb3VjbHlOVExvaw) and participate. While I'll be signing copies of [_**Creating the Declaration of Independence**_](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/11/WOhwriQu0E4AIFyQCsVoZw/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMnZOelU4bg)at the event, the[ Heartland registration link](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/12/CEDS5kFclGi7hDTGrIXoWg/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhcnRsYW5kLm9yZy9ldmVudHMvZXZlbnRzL2NyZWF0aW5nLXRoZS1kZWNsYXJhdGlvbi1vZi1pbmRlcGVuZGVuY2U) provides you with an option to order a signed copy if you can't be with us._**David J. Shestokas**_
| | [](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/13/KSPNDb3qVWqwEHIgG0zuDg/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMnZOelU4bg)
---
**What others are saying about****[ _Creating the Declaration of Independence_.](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/14/mlO56CxYBkiI69nAybuBbw/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMnZOelU4bg)** Dave crafts such a great story. Dave weaves together the events leading up to the creation of one of our sacred founding documents. He places the reader in the midst of the actions and thoughts of the Founders and provides a “worm’s eye” view of the events that took place in the days leading up to July 4, 1776. For people who care about the birth of America and want to learn how and why it all came about, this book is an excellent resource. **Tom Scott, Author,**[**Stack the Legal Odds in Your Favor**](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/15/ubyL6Tsr_MWJklepdzwFcQ/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMmVSdWQ1eQ) David Shestokas has made an important part of our history accessible and interesting. David has a gift for taking things that we think we know and understand already, and adjusting the vantage point in such a way as to allow us to see things differently or more clearly.**Brent Hamachek, Author,****[Time for a Turning Point](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/16/El4prya1xQt3e5s1WM-fHQ/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMmVSSWRmeQ)**
| [](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/17/BKM1GByCZ3QNlE_Xyr_1EQ/aHR0cDovL3d3dy5zaGVzdG9rYXMuY29tL2Fib3V0LWRhdmlkLWotc2hlc3Rva2FzLw)
---
**One reason I wrote**[ _**Creating the Declaration of Independence**_](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/18/4zJ-icwTbqkum-ahVJz0JA/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMnZOelU4bg) 2017 is the 30th Anniversary of my admission to practice law. The final part of becoming a lawyer is to swear an oath to uphold the Constitution of the United States. As I raised my right hand and placed my left on the-Bible, the thought ran through my mind that at no time during law school was the meaning of this oath explained. I've spent the ensuing thirty years working to figure that out. What I've discovered is that not only the technical aspects of the Constitution are involved, but there's an underlying philosophy linked to the Constitution that one must support to truly support the Constitution. That philosophy is found in the Declaration of Independence and its self-evident truths that all men are created equal with inalienable rights that we are born with and are not granted by government. I've discovered that one cannot support the Constitution without study and understanding of the Declaration of Independence. My first book, [** _Constitutional Sound Bites_**](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEkAJ0MovAAAAAAwAfkAAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZfu5ekFLFJzSjSrGL45eBGPpihgAIQoU/19/x-jF9bPtnPvwXMCoOx-qjQ/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMmg2VWZDQg), provides an example of this. That book, while devoted to the Constitution, contains 140 references to the Declaration of Independence.

clean_body: | Join us on August 16 at Heartland Institute | | | Join Us in Person or Online August 16 CREATING THE DECLARATION OF INDEPENDENCE At HEARTLAND INSTITUTE, AUGUST 16, 2017 Hope you can join me at the on August 16 when I will be discussing my new book, , which takes you to the weeks before July 4, 1776, and into the minds of Richard Henry Lee, John Adams, and Thomas Jefferson. You can , which begins at 5:30 PM CDT . If you are unable to join us in person, beginning at 6 PM.We recently celebrated the 241st anniversary of our nation's birth. The celebrations were marked with parades, barbecues and fireworks with little reflection upon the dramas preceding July 4, 1776. Scant thought is given to the reason for the parties: the birth of our nation and announcement of its core principles in the Declaration of Independence. sheds light on WHY there's a celebration.On August 16th at Heartland, I'll be talking about Richard Henry Lee's trepidation as he knows when he proposes American Independence to the Second Continental Congress that he is literally risking beheading. There's also the back stories of Adams and Jefferson at City Tavern as over a beer they begin crafting the Declaration of Independence and how Jefferson came to reluctantly draft the Declaration when few others, including Adams, thought that Jefferson's assignment was important. I'll provide a lawerly insight into a shortcut Jefferson used to craft a document of such immortality on such short notice.The special skills of Jefferson will be on display as we talk about how he set forth in 55 words the American Creed, beginning with "We hold these truths to be self-evident..." While I hope you'll , but if you're unable, tune into the and participate. While I'll be signing copies of the event, the provides you with an option to order a signed copy if you can't be with us.David J. Shestokas | | What others are saying about Dave crafts such a great story. Dave weaves together the events leading up to the creation of one of our sacred founding documents. He places the reader in the midst of the actions and thoughts of the Founders and provides a “worm’s eye” view of the events that took place in the days leading up to July 4, 1776. For people who care about the birth of America and want to learn how and why it all came about, this book is an excellent resource. Tom Scott, Author, David Shestokas has made an important part of our history accessible and interesting. David has a gift for taking things that we think we know and understand already, and adjusting the vantage point in such a way as to allow us to see things differently or more clearly.Brent Hamachek, Author, | One reason I wrote 2017 is the 30th Anniversary of my admission to practice law. The final part of becoming a lawyer is to swear an oath to uphold the Constitution of the United States. As I raised my right hand and placed my left on the-Bible, the thought ran through my mind that at no time during law school was the meaning of this oath explained. I've spent the ensuing thirty years working to figure that out. What I've discovered is that not only the technical aspects of the Constitution are involved, but there's an underlying philosophy linked to the Constitution that one must support to truly support the Constitution. That philosophy is found in the Declaration of Independence and its self-evident truths that all men are created equal with inalienable rights that we are born with and are not granted by government. I've discovered that one cannot support the Constitution without study and understanding of the Declaration of Independence. My first book, , provides an example of this. That book, while devoted to the Constitution, contains 140 references to the Declaration of Independence. | This e-mail has been sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com, .

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: big victories last week
body:
Let's start August with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tonight's deadline to help elect Democrats in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523032/4067b0a/32d9966af/7e6c1fcf/2454013090/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/July-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170731_tp_nd&source=em_20170731_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170731_tp_nd")**

Something big happened last week, Derek, and it didn't happen in Washington.

Last Tuesday night, Democrats won special elections for state senate seats in Massachusetts and New Hampshire -- in New Hampshire, it was the first time a Democrat won a special election for state senate since 1984.

These victories happened because Democrats came out in force, with a fire in our bellies and ready to fight. We won because we organized.

If we do that in every corner of every state -- make calls, knock on doors and talk to our neighbors, and support all of our local Democratic candidates -- we can win everywhere. My number one priority as Chair of the Democratic Party is to make sure we have the resources to do just that.

Help make sure we can make the investments in state parties and candidates that will drive Democrats to victory. Pitch in $3 or more before tonight's end-of-month fundraising deadline.

Our message is working but there

As you know, I support fixing

lasting results.

This message is resonating more
and more each day as Republican leaders join our call for a
common-sense solution.

But there is still more work to

able to help us out with a quick online donation to help us pay
for the tools that are getting our message out?

America's best days are ahead. I
believe that wholeheartedly but we'll get there much faster if
our leaders will start working for the American people and
finding meaningful solutions to our greatest challenges.

We're all in this together. Thank
you for all that you're doing to help.

-John

name: Scott Arceneaux
subject: Midnight tonight
body:
#
Team --
I'm going to keep this short -- I know a lot of you are tight on time.
Our fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and once again, we're asking you stand up and be counted among our supporters -- to demonstrate our campaign's people power:
[**Will you contribute to our campaign before our end of month deadline?**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32d8/9e00690/4c6f42d0/24036cde/1404184475/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170731am")
Your contribution will make it possible for us to open up satellite campaign offices across the state, print literature for our volunteers to give out when they're knocking doors, and provide the infrastructure we need to contact voters.
We won't get that money from the corrupt special interests groups and lobbyists. We're counting on you.
We can win this campaign and make history -- but only if we're all willing to come together to ensure we can spread our message to voters in all 67 counties. So let us know, and be sure to let us know by midnight, if you're all in. [**The place is here and the time is now:**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32d8/9e00690/4c6f42d0/24036cde/1404184475/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170731am")

Thank you for making this possible.
Bring it home,
Scott Arceneaux

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: uniting to defend America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __ It's hard to watch and read the news these days without worrying about our future. Our health care system barely avoided catastrophe (by 1 vote!) on Friday morning and access to care is still under threat. The Trump Administration has proposed a budget that disinvests in America. And our national security is at risk -- every day. We're being led by a party and a president who are making dangerous decisions and undermining our government and civic culture daily. It's more than a little disconcerting -- it's downright scary. But I will say this: I believe that we have a system of government that is stronger than any one person or any one party. And, in the end, we will prevail. It's going to take work though. It's going to take all of us uniting to defend our democracy. [**Will you join me and Democrats across the country in fighting for the values we cherish? With your help, we WILL take back control in 2018 >>**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bcd/70cdc2ba/4682b629/397c19e/401624457/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eom71?refcode=em073117_1&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+me+and+Democrats+across+th&utm_campaign=em073117&source=em073117") The American people have shown incredible strength over these past few months. In cities and towns throughout the nation, people have rallied against Trumpcare, stood up for environmental protections and called for policies to grow our economy with more shared property. Democrats in Congress have put forward an agenda that responds to the needs of all Americans. Our plan is focused on raising wages, lowering the cost of living and increasing access to skills development and educational opportunities. But before we can fully implement this plan we need to gain more seats in the U.S. Senate and House of Representatives. You can help right now--before the deadline tonight at midnight--and join the fight to win back the majority and change the direction of our country. **[_Please contribute today, before the deadline tonight at midnight, and let's get our nation back on track._](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bcd/70cdc2ba/4682b629/397c19f/401624457/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eom71?refcode=em073117_1&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+contribute+today+before+the+deadl&utm_campaign=em073117&source=em073117")** Thank you, Chris Van Hollen U.S. Senator

For folks in my state, and the Virginia economy, affordable health care and strengthened Medicaid are critical. But if it were up to Trump and his allies in Congress, the Affordable Care Act would be gone and Medicaid would be gutted.

In my administration, we believe that if you work hard, you should be able to put food on the table and even save a little. But across the country, Republican legislatures and governors continue to give handouts to the wealthy, and some have even lowered the minimum wage.

In Virginia, even before President Trump pulled out of the Paris accord, I began the process of carbon reduction unilaterally. But most Republicans refuse to even acknowledge simple scientific facts.

On issue after issue, the gap between what the majority of Americans want and what Republicans in Washington and state capitols across the country are doing is wider than it has ever been.

**[So if we're going to get our country back on the right track, we need to replace Republicans at every level of office with Democrats who will fight for the values that most Americans believe in.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523046/4067b0a/32c74a057/7e6cfbf7/160539040/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/July-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+So+if+were+going+to+get+our+country+back&utm_campaign=em_20170731_tm_nd&source=em_20170731_tm_nd&refcode=em_20170731_tm_nd")**

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Virginia
body:
Let's start August with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tonight's deadline to help elect Democrats in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052305e/4067b0a/32b2841fb/7e6ce4ee/1737784254/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/July-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170731_tp2_nd&source=em_20170731_tp2_nd&refcode=em_20170731_tp2_nd")**

Derek, I wanted to make sure you saw this because it's a big deal:

We're making a major commitment in Virginia to help Ralph Northam, Justin Fairfax, and Mark Herring win, and elect more Virginia Democrats down the ticket.

This investment will empower Democratic candidates across the Commonwealth to build stronger organizing, digital, and data programs. And we're doubling the number of organizers on the ground, too.

**[We're all-in in Virginia, Derek. If you are too, pitch in $3 or more to help elect Democrats there and across the country before our fundraising deadline tonight.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052305e/4067b0a/32b2841fb/7e6ce4ef/1737784254/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/July-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Were+allin+in+VirginiaCUSTOMDATASETslugw&utm_campaign=em_20170731_tp2_nd&source=em_20170731_tp2_nd&refcode=em_20170731_tp2_nd")**

Republicans and their special interest allies like the Koch brothers are taking these races seriously, and so are we. No matter what level of office, no matter what corner of the Commonwealth, no one will be able to say that Democrats didn't do everything we could to win.

And if we organize and win in Virginia, we can build the same foundation for victory in every single state. We can give every Democratic candidate the support they need to campaign on a level playing field against the GOP's billionaire donors and super PACs -- but only if we have grassroots supporters like you in our corner.

Pitch in $3 before tonight's deadline to help us keep making major investments like this one, kick Republicans out of office, and elect Democrats from the school board to the Senate.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Samantha Gross (via vanhollen.org)
subject: FWD: uniting to defend America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __ Did you see Chris' email earlier? [**Check it out below and help make sure we have the resources we need to take this country back in 2018 >>>**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bca/70cdc2ba/468be2e9/397c010/1894816427/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eom71?refcode=em073117_1&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+me+and+Democrats+across+th&utm_campaign=em073117&source=em073117") \-------------
It's hard to watch and read the news these days without worrying about our future. Our health care system barely avoided catastrophe (by 1 vote!) on Friday morning and access to care is still under threat. The Trump Administration has proposed a budget that disinvests in America. And our national security is at risk -- every day.
We're being led by a party and a president who are making dangerous decisions and undermining our government and civic culture daily. It's more than a little disconcerting -- it's downright scary. But I will say this: I believe that we have a system of government that is stronger than any one person or any one party. And, in the end, we will prevail.
It's going to take work though. It's going to take all of us uniting to defend our democracy.
[**Will you join me and Democrats across the country in fighting for the values we cherish? With your help, we WILL take back control in 2018 >>**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bca/70cdc2ba/468be2e9/397c010/1894816427/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eom71?refcode=em073117_1&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+me+and+Democrats+across+th&utm_campaign=em073117&source=em073117")
The American people have shown incredible strength over these past few months. In cities and towns throughout the nation, people have rallied against Trumpcare, stood up for environmental protections and called for policies to grow our economy with more shared property.
Democrats in Congress have put forward an agenda that responds to the needs of all Americans. Our plan is focused on raising wages, lowering the cost of living and increasing access to skills development and educational opportunities.
But before we can fully implement this plan we need to gain more seats in the U.S. Senate and House of Representatives. You can help right now--before the deadline tonight at midnight--and join the fight to win back the majority and change the direction of our country.
[**Please contribute today, before the deadline tonight at midnight, and let's get our nation back on track.**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bca/70cdc2ba/468be2e9/397c010/1894816427/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eom71?refcode=em073117_1&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+me+and+Democrats+across+th&utm_campaign=em073117&source=em073117")
Thank you,
Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I need your ideas re: Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Thanks so much for your ongoing support.
Let me take this opportunity to give you an update as to what's been happening in recent weeks.
As you all know, the disastrous Republican "health care" proposals have, for the moment at least, been defeated. They were defeated because millions of Americans stood up and fought back. They made phone calls and sent emails, letting members of Congress know how they felt. They got their friends involved in the struggle by utilizing social media. They attended town hall meetings. They went to rallies, including some that I attended in Michigan, Maine, Nevada, Arizona, West Virginia, Ohio, Utah, Pennsylvania and Kentucky.
And in poll after poll, an overwhelming majority of the American people were absolutely clear about their opposition to these destructive plans:
No. We will not be throwing 32 million, 23 million, 22 million or 16 million Americans off of health insurance in order to give tax breaks to the rich and large corporations, and to further the right wing extremist ideology of the Koch brothers.
No. We will not be cutting Medicaid by $800 billion, raising premiums for older workers, defunding Planned Parenthood and making it almost impossible for people with pre-existing conditions to get affordable insurance.
Needless to say, while we have won at least a temporary victory by defeating horrific Republican proposals, that is not good enough. We need to go on the offensive, not simply remain in a defensive posture.
The status quo is not satisfactory. Too many Americans continue to have no health insurance. Too many are paying premiums, deductibles and co-payments that are much too high. Too many cannot afford the outrageously high cost of prescription drugs they need. Too many cannot gain access to high quality primary health care or dental care, even when they have insurance. Our goal is not complicated, and it is not radical. It is to have the United States join every other industrialized country on earth in guaranteeing health care for all. Health care must not be considered as a privilege or a commodity. It is a human right to which every man, woman and child is entitled.
Our goal is to create a rational, cost-effective health care system. Today in the United States, we are spending almost $10,000 a year per person on health care. This is absurd and unsustainable. We must not continue a system which is, by far, the most expensive, wasteful and bureaucratic in the world.
Our goal is to put health care dollars into disease prevention and the provision of health care, not insurance company profits, not outrageous salaries for health industry CEOs, not advertising, not billing, not lobbying or campaign contributions.
Our goal is to move this country to a Medicare-for-all, single-payer system.
Let me be clear. This will be an enormously difficult and prolonged struggle, and one which will require the efforts of tens of millions of Americans in every state in this country. It will, in fact, require a political revolution in which the American people participate in the political process in a way that we have not seen in the recent history of our democracy.
In order to pass a Medicare-for-all, single payer system we will be taking on the most powerful special interests in the country: Wall Street, the insurance companies, the drug companies, the corporate media, the Republican Party and the establishment wing of the Democratic Party. In opposition to our efforts there will be a never-ending barrage of TV ads, editorials, political attacks and lies.
If we are going to be successful in this struggle, we have got to be smart - very smart. Not only do we need strong legislation (which I will be offering shortly and an outline of which I will be sending to you), but we need an unprecedented organizing and educational campaign.
How do we counter the lies and distortions against Medicare-for-all that is sure to come? How do we make certain that all of us - men and women, gay and straight, black, white, Latino, Asian-American, Native American -- are in this struggle together? How do we bring young and healthy people to stand alongside the elderly, the sick and the poor?
The battle that we are undertaking is enormous and unprecedented in the modern history of our country. Please send us your ideas as to how we can best go forward. Please give us your vision of what a humane and rational health care system looks like. Please share your experiences with the current system. Please help us map out an effective political strategy.
We are in this together. We need everyone's ideas.
Thanks again for your support and all that you are doing.
In solidarity,
Bernie
